name: test-failure-repair
description: Diagnose failing Python tests, isolate the smallest regression, patch the implementation, and rerun pytest with focused cases first.

name: skill-recommender
description: Rank installed, generated, and plugin-backed skills using semantic similarity, association rules, graph proximity, usage decay, success rate, risk, and cost.

name: trace-mining
description: Mine Agent task traces with clustering, frequent sequence mining, association rules, and coverage gap analysis.

name: skill-authoring
description: Create standard Agent skill directories with SKILL.md frontmatter, reusable workflow notes, evidence links, and candidate metadata.

name: skill-safety-review
description: Review generated skills for dangerous commands, credential leakage, unauthorized paths, dependency installation, and user confirmation gates.

name: frontend-screenshot-verify
description: For React or Vite UI changes, run a production build, open the app, capture desktop and mobile screenshots, and check text overflow or blank canvases.

name: terminal-dashboard
description: Build a terminal dashboard with dense status panels, fallback plain text rendering, and clear command affordances for demos.

name: experiment-reporting
description: Turn mining outputs into reproducible experiment tables, recommendation metrics, design-document summaries, and demo talking points.

name: cli-polish
description: Improve Python argparse CLIs with clear subcommands, JSON output, demo shortcuts, and actionable error handling.
